commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bb6be4fb249755e71f25efa5d49db58c04dce10d)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an adaptive Markdown table mode for Microsoft Teams, builds Adaptive Card table attachments for table segments, makes it the msteams default, and expands shared MarkdownTableMode config/schema types with tests.

PR surface: Source +221, Tests +151. Total +372 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: adaptive table segments are represented as `{ adaptiveCard }`, then `sendMSTeamsMessages` filters to text/media-only messages before sending. A focused test that sends an adaptiveCard-only batch would reproduce the empty send result on the PR head.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blockers are concrete enough for a repair pass: keep adaptive-card messages sendable, preserve upgrade-safe defaults, and cover the send batch path with tests.
